attractions.name: Garden of Caves
attractions.description: A lesser-known gem, this lush landscape is dotted with mini waterfalls, natural rock formations, and shaded walking paths

attractions.name: Mawsmai Cave
attractions.description: A naturally formed limestone cave where narrow passages, cool interiors, and filtered light create a slightly adventurous yet accessible experience
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Anitha- North East.pdf

attractions.name: Seven Sisters Waterfalls (Nohsngithiang Falls)
attractions.description: A series of cascading waterfalls flowing down a wide cliff face—especially stunning during monsoon, but still worth visiting for the expansive valley views

attractions.name: Nohkalikai Waterfalls
attractions.description: One of India's tallest plunge waterfalls, dramatically dropping into a deep turquoise pool below. The viewpoint offers sweeping vistas and a sense of scale that's truly breathtaking

attractions.name: Wei Sawdong Falls
attractions.description: Two-tier pools, great for a refreshing swim (seasonal; be cautious after rains)
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Anitha- North East.pdf

attractions.name: Nohkalikai Falls
attractions.description: One of India's tallest plunge waterfalls; dramatic viewpoints
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Anitha- North East.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Roads in Meghalaya are winding—avoid sudden movements while driving
Surfaces can be slippery at waterfalls — wear proper footwear

health_tips.tip: Use mosquito repellent, important for outdoor areas

source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Anitha- North East.pdf
